name: Everyone Indoor Golf (Bloomfield)
about: Everyone Indoor Golf is an unmanned golf simulator facility operating on an appointment-only basis. The venue provides a private indoor golfing experience with multiple time-based pricing tiers. It is equipped with a golf simulator offering real-time feedback such as smash factor, ball spin rate, and club head speed. The facility is suitable for groups of up to four people and accommodates all skill levels, though it requires players to bring their own clubs as balls, tees, and virtual courses are provided.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible booking with one-time entry codes
Real-time swing and ball data feedback
Variety of famous and local golf courses available
Unmanned facility for private group sessions
BYOB food and drink policy with on-site vending

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food and drinks are allowed. An on-site vending machine is available with candy bars, sodas, and water.
No alcohol is permitted on the premises.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs. The facility provides balls, tees, and access to the virtual golf courses.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and drinks are permitted. The venue also has a vending machine on-site with snacks and beverages, but alcohol is not allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The standard time to play a round of golf is 1 hour per person. It is recommended to book an extra 30 minutes for your first visit to allow time to familiarize yourself with the facility.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Players must be 18 or older to book the facility on their own. Those who are 17 or younger must be accompanied by a parent or guardian.
